name: The C² Method
description: The free, open-source AI-native build method. C² turns AI coding agents into genuine development partners — a method, templates, and a starter you drop into any project. Context × Code, multiplied by AI.
estimated_time: Half a day to set up
what_you_build: An AI build practice: a contextbase that lives in git, a .md Router your agent reads first, and the session-brief discipline that makes your AI agent smarter every session.
starter_prompt: I want to adopt the C² Method on my project. Read the C² methodology and quick-start, then walk me through setting up the folder structure, the .md Router (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md), and my first Prompt Brief and Session Brief.
seo_title: The C² Method — Open-Source AI-Native Build Method | Waymaker
seo_description: C² is a free, open-source build method that turns AI coding agents into genuine development partners. Context × Code, multiplied by AI. Templates and a starter you can use today.
